allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Latest:', d['dist-tags']?.latest\); console.log\('Versions tail:', d.versions?.slice\(-5\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({v:p.version,engines:p.engines,peer:p.peerDependencies},null,2\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse error',e.message\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('esbuild version:', p.version, 'description:', p.description\)}catch\(e\){} }\)")
